info.title: M86 Admin Dashboard Service API
info.description: Stable API contract for implemented M86 control-plane endpoints in Solomon. M86 owns control-plane routes under /api/admin/v1/actions/*, /api/admin/v1/identity/*, /api/admin/v1/moderation/*, /api/admin/v1/abuse-prevention/*, /api/admin/v1/finance/*, and /api/admin/v1/compliance/*, /api/admin/v1/integrations/*, and /api/admin/v1/platform-ops/*.
